default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic is holding steady with slight improvements in views and active users](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [New content strategy focuses on MCP keywords and AI security glossary terms](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Plan to create assignments for MCP security content and outlines for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Need to coordinate with Melissa on web experience updates for glossary 2.0 project](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### Traffic Update

  - [417 organic views on the blog last week (59% of total blog traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [267 active users, higher than recent weeks](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Slight improvements in views and user engagement, but not dramatic](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - ["Securing AI Agents Without Secrets" article performing well and shared most by influencers](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on two main "bets" with 80-90% of attention, leaving room for experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [Bet 1: MCP Keywords (159 keywords identified, 1-2 months of content)](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
      - [Opportunity for early mover advantage in AI security space](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [Plan to create assignments and outlines for review](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Bet 2: AI Security Glossary Terms](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Significant search volume opportunity with low difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Need to update web experience to support new glossary structure](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
      - [Aim to connect terms to non-human identity and AI concepts](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### Experimentation Ideas

  - [Industry-specific angles for AI security topics](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)
  - [Explore agentic AI identity access topics from ChatGPT-generated report](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [Consider snarky, authentic voice for certain topics (e.g., "prompt injection is just SQL injection all over again")](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)

### Content Approach

  - [Balance between broad AI security coverage and deep expertise in identity-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Maintain authenticity when covering less familiar topics](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2195.0)
  - [Allow for individual author voices while maintaining overall brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create initial assignments for MCP security content](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Share outlines with thesis statements for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Dan to coordinate call with Melissa to discuss web experience updates for glossary 2.0](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2370.0)
  - [Team to review and comment on ChatGPT-generated agentic AI topic list](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Implement new content strategy and track success, pivoting as needed based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/YymRU76zkxeYx2PvS3uPwzCrk_xRzDfu?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)

action_items.description: Adjust blog post descriptions to be shorter on blog homepage
Create initial MCP security content assignments, share for feedback
Prepare & share first batch of outlines w/ thesis statements for feedback
Review AI security topic analysis, comment on standout items
Review AI security topic analysis, comment on standout items
Schedule call w/ Kyle, Apurva, Melissa re glossary 2.0 web experience
